leadText: The Silk Scarf (Japanese: シルクのスカーフ Silk Scarf) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation III 1.2 Generation IV 1.3 Generation V onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves by 10%. It also boosts the holder's confusion damage by 10%. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves by 20%. It also boosts the holder's confusion damage by 20%. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] No longer boosts the holder's confusion damage.
